ham.subject: Your Account: Daily Transaction Alert
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We wanted to inform you that a transaction of INR 5,000 was made from your account ending in 1234 on 15 Apr 2026 at 10:30 AM. If you recognize this transaction, no action is required. If you do not recognize this transaction, please contact us immediately.

Thank you,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks has generated an invoice that requires your immediate attention. Please review the invoice details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not settle this invoice within 24 hours, your account will be suspended. For any questions, simply reply to this email.

Thank you,
QuickBooks Support
